title: ProductVariant
description: A product variant with SKU, attributes, prices, and images.

id.description: Variant ID unique within the product (starting at 1 for master).

sku.description: Stock keeping unit identifier for this variant.

key.description: User-defined unique key for the variant.

prices.description: List of prices for different currencies, channels, and customer groups.

attributes.description: Product attributes as defined by the product type.

images.description: List of images for this variant.
